dbEquipBonuses.name: Manticore's Mane Bite
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you use a Daily power, the next enemy that attacks you takes damage equal to 50% of your max health (30 second cooldown). In PvP this damage is reduced to 10% of your max health. +4.5% Defense.
